name: quarkus-agentic
description: Scaffolding skill for building Quarkus + LangChain4j agentic AI applications with Bob: new projects, AI services, agents/workflows, and RAG pipelines. Pairs with the repository's BOB.md conventions.

interface.shortDescription: Scaffold Quarkus + LangChain4j AI services, agents, and RAG pipelines.
interface.longDescription: Reusable Bob workflow for creating Quarkus + LangChain4j applications, AI services, declarative agent workflows, and RAG pipelines from opinionated templates.
capabilities: Create declarative AI services and agent workflows
Set up Easy RAG and embedding-store starter code
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the quarkus-langchain4j-scaffolding skill to scaffold a Quarkus + LangChain4j component.
